# Description

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] New detector / pattern
- [ ] New vault provider
- [ ] New marketplace plugin
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (test-first) and `go test ./... -race` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] No real secrets in code or tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"
- [ ] `claude plugin validate` passes for any manifest changes
